item.title: Walking 40 ft with ankle weights today.
item.description: Walking with ankle weights and turning the corner without having to stop and keeping my balance. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day. It has been a while and I wanted give an update.

item.title: What Happened Today #62
item.description: The authoritarian machine is burning hot and cold—unleashing chaos while pretending it’s all under control. Trump’s economic blitz hits 60 countries (and a few penguins), while law firms and corporations keep folding to pressure, striking deals that trade integrity for survival. At home, mass firings rip through federal agencies. The CDC was gutted, the Social Security chief’s hanging on by a thread, and even the FDA's vaccine process has been hijacked. Meanwhile, his DOJ is stuffed with Musk loyalists and former hackers, and a clown-car senator mocks constituents for losing their jobs. This isn’t drift. It’s design. The purge is real—and it’s accelerating. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Links 1. https://www.cnn.com/business/live-news/tariffs-trump-news-04-02-25/index.html 2. https://www.axios.com/2025/04/02/senate-repeal-trump-tariffs-canada 3. https://www.yahoo.com/news/us-bans-government-personnel-china-040933519.html 4. https://www.euronews.com/my-europe/2025/04/03/danish-prime-minister-refutes-us-claim-on-greenland-on-visit-to-the-arctic-territory 5. https://www.wabi.tv/2025/04/02/acting-ssa-commissioner-facing-calls-resign-after-trying-change-way-maine-parents-register-babies-social-security-numbers/ 6. https://www.kfyrtv.com/2025/04/02/term-limits-return-2026-ballot/ 7. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/apr/02/nih-funding-trump-lawsuit 8. https://apnews.com/article/epa-federal-green-bank-grants-7b158181bbf1053686bab67b02fa0e35 9. https://www.cnbc.com/2025/04/02/eric-adams-case-dismissed-new-york-trump-doj.html 10. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5228599-trump-milbank-law-firm-deal/ 11. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/04/02/health/cdc-tump-health.html 12. https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/meta-antitrust-trial-zuckerberg-lobbying-trump-67c8f3a5?mod=hp_lead_pos1 13. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/amazon-tiktok-potential-us-buyers-rcna199318 14. https://www.wired.com/story/trump-tariffs-antarctic-islands-heard-mcdonald/ 15. https://www.indystar.com/story/news/politics/2025/04/02/indiana-jim-banks-senator-republican-viral-videos-federal-workers-town-halls/82773982007/ 16. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/02/top-trump-fda-official-brenner-hits-pause-on-novavax-vaccine-decision-00266623 17. https://www.reuters.com/technology/cybersecurity/doge-official-doj-bragged-about-hacking-distributing-pirated-software-2025-04-02/ 18. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-nominee-u-s-attorney-in-d-c-ed-martin-blocked-adam-schiff/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The Void
item.description: Getting the feeling that our strip collections are somewhat of a crisis indicator. First book came out in the same week as the first lockdown. Second book when Trump decided to trash the American economy ? Get it before the tariffs hit ? https://bookshop.org/p/books/hi-earth-elizabeth-pich/21567543
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: 10 months sober
item.description: Never thought that I would make it this far when I first stopped. In fact I was certain that I would relapse. And it's not over yet. But I'm feeling a lot better about myself, and not being drunk every day of the week has really changed things for me for the better
item.dc:creator: oldradios19772000

item.title: Asking the BIG Questions! [OC]
item.description:
Previously unreleased BONUS COMIC below!
Shoutout for Hubby's show! We're looking to turn his comic into a cartoon too! More info at https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/ghosthause/greetings-from-grisley-the-animated-series
BONUS Comic! I wish I could claim Fran's lines, but they were actually our pal Zach from Last Place Comics https://www.instagram.com/last_place_comics/ when J was relaying the conversation he had with out youngest in a group chat! Thanks to my patrons for making these bonuses possible! https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
